smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/distribution/test_aggregate.py -q -> 18 passed. Each incompatible-scale passive signal (0-6 / probability / bool) maps to a categorical flag then votes; passive and efflux come out as separate fields; no cross-scale averaging.

note: distribution aggregator: passive-penetration vote SEPARATE from efflux vote (F-4); incompatible scales mapped-then-voted, never averaged; Kp,uu surfaced apart; calibrated gate policy DEFERRED.
